description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is predominantly white with sections of wood paneling and large glass windows, creating a sleek and contemporary appearance. The house is surrounded by a manicured lawn, small shrubs, and a few trees, with a paved driveway leading up to the main entrance. The property is bordered by a low hedge and is situated adjacent to a wide, gray street that wraps around two sides of the lot. The main entryway features a simple, recessed door with a small overhang and a direct path from the driveway. The overall design emphasizes minimalism, open space, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of white and wood exterior, set on a landscaped lot with a driveway and bordering street.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and landscaped yard with shrubs and trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, wood paneling, and the bordering street.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back lawn, additional windows, and the continuation of the street.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more of the yard, trees, and the house's flat roof profile.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a small overhang, direct path from driveway, minimal decorative elements
